services.title: IT Professional Services
services.excerpt: National technology staffing and consulting — contract, direct-hire, and project-based experts who integrate with your teams to deliver results across software, infrastructure, and digital transformation initiatives.

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.excerpt: Production-ready intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and MLOps solutions that help enterprises move from experimentation to measurable outcomes — applied across healthcare, finance, manufacturing, and government.

services.title: Enterprise Integrations
services.excerpt: Unified connectivity across legacy systems, cloud platforms, and partner ecosystems — API gateways, event-driven architectures, and integration middleware that keep mission-critical data flowing reliably at enterprise scale.

services.title: Data Engineering
services.excerpt: Governed data lakes, warehouses, pipelines, and real-time analytics platforms built with lineage, quality controls, and metadata management — the foundation your AI, reporting, and compliance programs depend on.

services.title: Engineering & Data Processing Solutions
services.excerpt: Real-world hardware and systems engineering including FPGA design, data processing unit development in Verilog, embedded systems, and OT/IT convergence — delivering industrial-grade solutions for manufacturing, automotive, and critical infrastructure clients.

services.title: Logistics App Suites
services.excerpt: Route optimization, fleet management, compliance tracking, and mobile workforce tools configured for your operational model — maximizing utilization and service levels across distribution and field service networks.

services.title: Staffing Solutions
services.excerpt: MSP/VMS program excellence with nationwide recruiting and delivery — placing qualified technology and engineering professionals across all 50 states on a time-sensitive, compliance-assured basis.

services.title: Cybersecurity & Quantum Readiness
services.excerpt: End-to-end quantum readiness assessments, cryptographic discovery, post-quantum risk scoring, and hybrid PQC implementation — protecting sensitive data and infrastructure against evolving threats.

services.title: Business Process Outsourcing
services.excerpt: Strategic front and back-office outsourcing that drives operational efficiency, cost optimization, and business growth — extending your capabilities through global delivery models and process automation.

quantumReadiness.title: Cybersecurity & Quantum Readiness
quantumReadiness.subtitle: Quantum Readiness as a Service — aligned with NIST PQC standards
quantumReadiness.intro: Quantum computing threatens widely deployed RSA, ECC, and TLS cryptography. Heritage InfoTech helps regulated enterprises inventory cryptographic assets, quantify post-quantum risk, and implement hybrid PQC migration paths — without disrupting mission-critical operations.

tiles.title: Quantum Readiness Assessments
tiles.summary: Executive and technical assessments mapping quantum threat timelines, regulatory obligations, and phased migration readiness across your enterprise.

tiles.title: Cryptographic Discovery
tiles.summary: Automated and expert-led inventory of certificates, keys, algorithms, and embedded cryptography — including shadow IT and third-party dependencies.

tiles.title: Post-Quantum Risk Scoring
tiles.summary: Data-driven prioritization by algorithm vulnerability, data lifespan, compliance exposure, and operational criticality — with board-ready reporting.

tiles.title: Hybrid PQC Resolutions
tiles.summary: Phased deployment of hybrid classical + NIST-selected PQC algorithms (CRYSTALS-Kyber, Dilithium, SPHINCS+) across PKI, TLS, and application encryption.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Partner with Heritage InfoTech for technology solutions that deliver measurable results.
